case_title: BERMUDEZ, RONALD FOR MINOR et al VS SANDOVAL, FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, FRANCISCO
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO FRANCISCO SANDOVAL, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BERMUDEZ, RONALD FOR MINOR CASTRO, VICTOR DANIEL: MINOR AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, FRANCISCO
